sizing_rule.note: Optimal f sizing derived from probability-weighted outcome distribution. Calculate expected value E(X) = Σ(Outcome × Probability) and variance across all outcomes, then solve for optimal fraction (f) that maximizes geometric growth of the account. Requires complete outcome table with associated probabilities and P&L values.

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be determined by analyzing the probability distribution of outcomes and their associated payoffs to calculate optimal fractional position sizing.
